title: angraecum viride
intro: Angraecum viride, also known as the green orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant's health benefits include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Angraecum viride typically involve drying and crushing the leaves or roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal use.
